questions.question_text_full: “Authorities have to focus on just stopping the spread, rather than putting the fire out.” This means that the authorities:

options.text: want only to slow down the spread of fire
do not want to put the fires out
want to stop the fires from spreading first and then put them out
want to put out the fires once and for all

questions.correct_option_text: want to stop the fires from spreading first and then put them out
